items.content:
# 🧠 Application Insights Monitoring Dashboard
Track telemetry from your FastAPI health checker app
items.name: Text - Header

content.query:
dependencies
| where type == "Http"
| summarize avg(duration) by target
| order by avg_duration desc

dependencies
| where resultCode startswith "4" or resultCode startswith "5"
| project timestamp, target, resultCode, success

customEvents
| where name == "URL Check Triggered"
| project timestamp, name, customDimensions
